allow: SlashCommand(/create-story Phase 1: Create src/ directory structure with proper .gitignore and version.json for DevForgeAI framework source files, establishing foundation for installer deployment without affecting current operations)

SlashCommand(/create-story Phase 2: Copy all DevForgeAI framework files from .claude/ and .devforgeai/ operational folders to src/claude/ and src/devforgeai/ directories, preserving structure and validating integrity, while keeping original operational folders unchanged for parallel development)

SlashCommand(/create-story Phase 3: Update all internal path references from .claude/ and .devforgeai/ to src/claude/ and src/devforgeai/ in framework source files, validating zero broken references through automated scanning and ensuring skills load reference files correctly from new source structure)

SlashCommand(/create-story Phase 4: Comprehensive testing of src/devforgeai/ structure validating all commands skills and subagents execute correctly with new source paths ensuring zero regressions before installer development and external deployment)

SlashCommand(/create-story Phase 5: Build version-aware installer script that detects existing installations handles version comparison creates timestamped backups deploys src/devforgeai/ to target project locations and provides rollback capability for safe framework distribution)

SlashCommand(/create-story Phase 6: Implement CLAUDE.md template merge logic with variable substitution and intelligent conflict resolution to preserve user instructions while injecting DevForgeAI framework sections requiring user approval for merge strategy)

SlashCommand(/create-story Phase 7: Full installation testing on external Node.js and .NET projects validating all commands work CLAUDE.md merge successful and rollback functions correctly ensuring production-ready installer before public release)
SlashCommand(/create-epic DevForgeAI src/ Migration and Installer System)

SlashCommand(/create-story Refactor /create-context command budget compliance - reduce from 16.2K to under 14K characters by extracting pattern documentation to references and condensing Phase N inline documentation)
Bash(for file in preflight-validation.md tdd-red-phase.md tdd-green-phase.md tdd-refactor-phase.md integration-testing.md phase-4.5-deferral-challenge.md dod-update-workflow.md)

SlashCommand(/ideate Enable parallel story development in DevForgeAI framework with GitHub Actions CI/CD integration, supporting concurrent /dev and /qa execution across multiple stories while preventing file system collisions, test output conflicts, and git operation races. Research Claude Code Terminal headless mode capabilities, GitHub Actions best practices for AI workflows, and design story-scoped isolation strategy (branches, test directories, lock files) that scales from solo developers to teams of 10+ while maintaining DevForgeAI quality gates and zero-debt principles.)
Bash(else echo "Test results not yet available")
